prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约9633→9960→9627→8850→8869，2021–2023年基本稳定在9600名附近，2024年明显前移至8850名，2025年基本持平于8869 名；近两年位次较2021–2023年整体前移约700–800名，显示报考热度有所上升；本省物理类计划2021年138人、2022年141人、2023年141人、2024年140人、2025 年148人；2026年计划156人，较2025年扩招8人（+5.4%），扩招幅度适中，对竞争有一定加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名 近年持续上升：2021年第62名→2024年第68名→2025年第63名→2026年第57名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所增加；2024年声誉评价 为中性/混合，涉及师德失范调查但处理及时；抖音学校热度总排名第7（高热），综合热度739万，在211高校中热度突出，张雪峰多次推荐该校为\"性价比很高的教育部直属双一 流\"，短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；化学工程与技术A、材料科学与工程A-、化学A-，三个学科均为A类，化工、材料领域实力突出；招生专业涵盖工科试 验班（先进材料/化工能源/生物医药）、计算机类、自动化类等，其中计算机类、自动化类属社会热门方向，化工材料类属\"生化环材\"大类（社会热度明显劝退），专业热度分 化明显。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业社会热度持续偏高，而化工、材料等传统工科热度偏低；本省2026年物理类考生167419人，较2 025年173347人减少约5928人（-3.4%），考生规模小幅缩减，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年扩招5.4%（推高位次数字）、软科排名持续上升（增强吸引力）、抖音高热（关注度提升）、本省物理类考生减少3.4%（缓解竞争）等多重 因素，扩招与排名上升的效应基本抵消考生减少的影响，但抖音高热和排名上升带来的关注度增量略占上风，预计2026年最低位次较2025年基准8869名小幅前移（数字减小）。预 测最低位次约9127名，区间8627–9627名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 9633 → 9960 → 9627 → 8850 → 8869. From 2021 to 2023, it remained stable around 9600, then notably moved forward to 8850 in 2024, and remained essentially flat at 8869 in 2025. In the past two years, the ranking has shifted forward by about 700–800 positions compared to 2021–2023, indicating increased application popularity. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 138 in 2021, 141 in 2022, 141 in 2023, 140 in 2024, and 148 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 156, an increase of 8 students (+5.4%) compared to 2025, a moderate expansion that somewhat intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking has been steadily rising: 62nd in 2021 → 68th in 2024 → 63rd in 2025 → 57th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to applicants. In 2024, its reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, involving an investigation into teacher ethics misconduct but handled promptly. On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranking is 7th (high heat), with a comprehensive popularity of 7.39 million, standing out among 211 universities. Zhang Xuefeng has repeatedly recommended it as a 'highly cost-effective, directly under the Ministry of Education, Double First-Class' university, with significant short video exposure and high application attention. Chemical Engineering and Technology is rated A, Materials Science and Engineering A-, and Chemistry A-, all three disciplines are A-class, with outstanding strength in chemical engineering and materials. Enrollment majors include Engineering Experimental Classes (Advanced Materials/Chemical Energy/Biomedicine), Computer Class, Automation Class, etc. Among them, Computer Class and Automation Class are socially popular directions, while Chemical Engineering and Materials Class fall under the 'Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials' category (socially discouraged), showing clear differentiation in major popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Class, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering maintain high social heat, while traditional engineering majors like Chemical Engineering and Materials have lower heat. In 2026, the province has 167,419 Physics Category examinees, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, a slight reduction in candidate scale, somewhat easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 5.4% enrollment expansion in 2026 (pushing ranking numbers upward), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), high Douyin heat (increasing attention), and a 3.4% decrease in provincial Physics Category examinees (easing competition), the effects of enrollment expansion and ranking rise largely offset the impact of the examinee reduction. However, the attention increment from Douyin heat and ranking rise slightly outweighs, so the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to move forward slightly (smaller number) compared to the 2025 baseline of 8869. Predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9127, with a range of 8627–9627.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Outstanding Engineer College).

- Science Experimental Class (Physics and Electronic Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Engineering and Energy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Biology and Medicine)
- Science Experimental Class (Green Chemistry)
- Environmental Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Big Data Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 8627–9627, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation Class, Dual Degree programs) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Hongde Academy, Computer Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Advanced Materials, Green Chemical Engineering, etc.) as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<8627), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper bound (>9627), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety net majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 1690 → 2014 → 1639 → 4383 → 1691. From 2021 to 2023, it fluctuated within the 1600–2000 range. In 2024, it abnormally shifted to 4383 (possibly due to a significant increase in the total number of liberal arts examinees that year). In 2025, it quickly recovered to 1691, indicating a strong mean-reversion characteristic for the university's liberal arts/history category rankings. The provincial history category enrollment plan was 17 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 21 in 2024, and 17 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 17, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university. The main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Chinese universities has been rising in recent years: 62nd in 2021 → 68th in 2024 → 63rd in 2025 → 57th in 2026, showing steady improvement, which also attracts liberal arts examinees. The reputation evaluation in 2024 was neutral/mixed. The university's overall popularity on Douyin ranked 7th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of 7.39 million, standing out among 211 universities. Zhang Xuefeng has recommended it multiple times, leading to high application attention. Chemical Engineering and Technology is rated A, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Chemistry A-, all science and engineering disciplines, with no direct mapping to liberal arts majors (Law, Business Administration, English, etc.), but the overall 211 platform and Beijing location still strongly attract liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially hot (recommended), Business Administration is differentiated and wait-and-see, English/Foreign Languages is generally wait-and-see. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in the province is 63,113, a significant decrease of approximately 21,766 (-25.6%) from 84,879 in 2025, indicating a notable reduction in examinee scale and significantly eased competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a significant 25.6% reduction in provincial history category examinees (significantly easing competition), the continuous rise in Shanghai Ranking (enhancing attractiveness), and high Douyin popularity (increased attention), the sharp decrease in examinees is the most critical factor affecting rankings. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly move forward (smaller number) compared to the 2025 baseline of 1691. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1651, with a range of 1354–1948.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<1354), you can focus on reaching for Law Excellent Experimental Class; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>1948), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety.
